entry.value:
{"currentConversationId":"__NEW_AGENT__","agentExecutionMode":"manual","isPanelCollapsed":true,"displayedAnnouncements":[],"conversations":{"b9e7dbc0-5a9f-42d0-8fe9-f5ba612d03f2":{"id":"b9e7dbc0-5a9f-42d0-8fe9-f5ba612d03f2","name":"JSON example for CreateProfessionalUseCase Input
","createdAtIso":"2025-10-26T22:40:31.972Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2025-10-26T22:40:47.354Z","chatHistory":[{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"a22afa81-109c-4fb4-a20c-9da0696491f9","timestamp":"2025-10-26T22:40:37.966Z","request_message":"create a json data class Input(
 val name: String,
 val email: String? = null,
 val phone: Phone? = null,
 val password: String? = null,
 val establishmentId: Long? = null,
 val bio: String? = null,
 val instagram: String? = null,
 val facebook: String? = null,
 val photo: String? = null,
 val workHours: List<Interval>? = null
 )","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"02d8dc33-2ca9-4fc9-aaa5-6fd3b4beb70b","timestamp":"2025-10-26T22:40:47.354Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"}],"feedbackStates":{"temp-fe-7dcfc1ac-a3f1-4c9e-8931-24ba8fcb711a":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""},"temp-fe-1655f123-cb6c-47fe-b2a5-6f6088eb576c":{"selectedRating":0,"feedbackNote":""}},"toolUseStates":{},"draftExchange":{"request_message":"","rich_text_json_repr":{"type":"doc","content":[{"type":"paragraph"}]},"status":"draft"},"requestIds":[],"isPinned":false,"isShareable":true,"extraData":{"isAgentConversation":true,"hasAgentOnboarded":true,"hasDirtyEdits":false,"hasTitleGenerated":true},"personaType":0,"rootTaskUuid":"4bce157f-6ffe-4b6b-8017-04b4cccb4a66"}},"isContextPaneOpen":false,"isActionsPaneOpen":false,"isAgentEditsCollapsed":true}
